situational_context: Running comeback week 4, consolidating at 5 km. Five runs completed since May 3 (after 182-day gap). Run #5 (May 23) was best execution: 5.02 km at HR 136, max 153, suffer 19 — cardiac efficiency improving run over run. Primary modality remains e-bike commuting (~38 km/day on work days, suffer ~14 per round trip). Chronic load declining (17.9, down from 22.3 two weeks ago) as older higher-load days roll off the 28-day window; this is expected, not a red flag. Acute load 17 with ACWR 0.95 — healthy building ratio. Training readiness 87 (HIGH), body battery 55.5 — best readings of the month, indicating strong recovery capacity. HRV stable (weekly avg 37, BALANCED). RHR 48-49 bpm (stable/improving). Weight steady at 103.8 kg (-0.3 from May 14). VO2max running improved to 38.9 (from 38.3 at comeback start). Heatwave in Paris (34°C May 28, orange alert) — heat precautions mandatory for outdoor sessions through May 29. Storms expected Saturday May 30, cooler 24°C by Sunday. Baby (Léonie, ~4.5 months) — one night <6h in last 7 but overall sleep adequate. No new labs. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: Execute Run #6 today at 12:00 with heat precautions (34°C canicule). Hydrate 500 ml minimum in the 2h before. Target HR ≤138 bpm; abort if HR stays >145 bpm for 5+ min (cardiac drift from heat). Bois de Vincennes, shaded paths. This consolidates the 5 km tier — 4th run at this distance.
recommendations.measurable: Run #6 completed ≤5 km, avg HR ≤138, no post-run pain lasting >24h

recommendations.text: Maintain ≥48h between runs through Sunday. Run #6 (Thu) → Run #7 (Sun) = 72h gap. Continue eccentric calf raises on non-run days (Fri, Sat) to support tendon adaptation during comeback.
recommendations.measurable: Calf raises done 2× before Run #7; zero localized pain between runs

recommendations.text: Protein intake averaging 131g vs 150g target. On training days (today, Sunday), aim for ≥150g with a post-run protein dose within 2h. Weight trend steady at 103.8 kg — good trajectory.
recommendations.measurable: ≥150g protein on May 28 and May 31 training days

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if RHR rises >5 bpm above 49 bpm baseline for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: RHR stable at 48-49 bpm; elevation would indicate overload or illness during comeback

markers_to_watch.threshold: Expect stabilization around 17-20 this week, then gradual increase as consistent training fills the window
markers_to_watch.reason: Chronic load decline from 22 to 18 is expected window rolloff — actual daily training load is maintained

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #6 triggers skip of Run #7
markers_to_watch.reason: At 103.8 kg, tissue tolerance remains the limiting factor; 5th and 6th runs at 5 km are still consolidation

markers_to_watch.threshold: HR drift >15 bpm from first km to last km during Run #6 in 34°C heat
markers_to_watch.reason: First run in heatwave conditions — monitor cardiac drift as a heat tolerance signal
